title: Build and Test an MCP Server with Official SDKs · Skill Foundry
summary: Implement a typed server with tools, resources, and automated protocol tests. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a runnable tested MCP server while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select an official maintained SDK and pin a compatible protocol target.
Create server metadata, capabilities, handlers, and transport entry points.
Validate structured inputs and return typed content or structured errors.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
